original_image_tags: A scanned document page showing the reverse side of a typed or carbon-copied document. The paper is off-white or light gray with significant noise and texture typical of older archival scans. The primary visual feature is faint, reversed (mirror-image) text showing through from the opposite side of the page. At the bottom (oriented upside down relative to the main viewing direction), there is a red ink stamp and a faint typed label.

elements.description: A faded red ink stamp at the bottom left, oriented upside down relative to the page's current orientation. The stamp contains the words 'TRANSMITTED', 'MAR 2 1 16 PM '49', 'MARCH', and 'FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER'.

judge.reason: Both agree on the presence of a red ink stamp at the bottom left oriented upside down, but only B provides specific quoted text from it while A describes the stamp generally.
